title: Ungrab Mouse
description: UngrabMouse allows players to freely toggle mouse capture with a single key, improving workflow and multitasking without pausing the game.
body: UngrabMouse allows players to freely toggle Minecraft’s mouse capture with a single key, making it easy to switch between applications without interrupting gameplay. This simple client-side mod improves workflow, multitasking, and multi-monitor usability by letting you release or recapture the mouse instantly.
